sections.title: Accessibility Consultants New York
sections.description:
New York is one of the most active states for ADA digital accessibility enforcement, making proactive compliance essential for organizations serving the public. Businesses, government agencies, schools, and healthcare providers must meet ADA and WCAG requirements for websites, digital documents, and physical environments.

Accessibility Innovations provides expert accessibility consulting in New York, helping organizations identify barriers, reduce compliance risk, and create inclusive experiences. Our certified consultants deliver ADA compliance services, WCAG evaluations, audits, remediation guidance, and training to help you achieve and maintain compliance with confidence.

Ready to strengthen your accessibility compliance? Contact Accessibility Innovations today to schedule a consultation.

image.alt: Accessibility consultants New York conducting a digital accessibility audit and compliance review

sections.title: Achieve ADA Compliance With Accessibility Innovations
sections.description:
Our accessibility consultants in New York help organizations meet ADA Title II and Title III obligations, along with federal and state accessibility requirements. ADA compliance is not optional businesses must ensure equal access, barrier removal, accessible communication, and digital accessibility. New York's public-facing organizations must also follow WCAG for websites, apps, and online services.

Who We Serve:

  • Government entities & city agencies
  • Schools, colleges, and universities
  • Nonprofits & community organizations
  • Healthcare providers & hospitals
  • Private-sector companies of all sizes

Our Services Include:

  • Accessibility audits (digital, documents, built-environment)
  • ADA & WCAG remediation consulting
  • Staff training programs on accessibility standards
  • Accessibility statements, policies, & compliance documentation

Our goal is to help your organization meet ADA requirements smoothly and avoid legal and financial risks while promoting equitable access.

sections.title: Our Accessibility Consulting Approach
sections.description: Our approach is structured, collaborative, and transparent. We help organizations understand barriers, meet compliance goals, and integrate accessibility into long-term operations.

items.title: Discovery & Assessment
items.description: We begin by reviewing your digital platforms, physical spaces, workflows, and policies.

items.title: Manual & Automated Testing
items.description: Our consultants use WCAG-compliant automated tools combined with manual, assistive-technology user testing.

items.title: Barrier Identification & Reporting
items.description: We identify issues affecting usability and compliance and provide clear, prioritized remediation guidance.

items.title: Remediation Support & Consulting
items.description: We guide internal teams or external vendors on how to fix accessibility issues correctly.

items.title: Validation & Compliance Assurance
items.description: We retest and validate updates to ensure WCAG and ADA compliance is fully achieved.

sections.title: Accessibility Plan & Policies
sections.description: We help organizations create or refine accessibility strategies that align with legal standards and business goals.

items.title: Align procurement practices with accessibility requirements
Review compliance posture across ADA, WCAG, and other standards
Enhance customer service and HR practices to support accessibility

sections.title: Digital Audits and Certifications
sections.description: Our web accessibility consultants conduct comprehensive WCAG audits, combining automated testing, manual reviews, and real assistive technology evaluations.

items.title: Compliance reporting for websites, apps, and digital content
Clear methodologies using automated tools + manual AT testing
Assistive technology testing using screen readers, keyboard navigation, and real user workflows

image.alt: AI WCAG 2.2 Level A+AA Conformance Test Report. Left: Client info, test scope, content items breakdown, and major accessibility issues. Right: Side Drawer Inc., pie chart of test results (Pass/Fail/N/A), and detailed results table.

sections.title: Training
sections.description: We offer customized training programs for teams across New York.

items.title: Tailored training for IT, HR, Facilities, and Customer Support
Ongoing learning opportunities for evolving ADA/WCAG standards

image.alt: A woman conducting an accessibility training session in a modern conference room, presenting disability inclusion charts on a projector screen to a diverse group using laptops and tablets.

sections.title: Why Choose Us as Your Accessibility Consultant in New York?
sections.description: When it comes to web accessibility audits, Accessibility Innovations stands out for several reasons:

items.title: Certified Experts

items.title: New York Regulation Knowledge

items.title: Full-Scope Services

items.title: Trusted Across U.S.

sections.title: Ensure Website Accessibility & ADA Compliance Today!
sections.description: Improve digital inclusivity, prevent lawsuits, and boost SEO with Accessibility Innovations. Book a Consultation and let our expert web accessibility consultants help you create an accessible, user-friendly website!

sections.title: Our ADA Accessibility Consulting Services in New York
sections.description: Explore our full suite of consulting services tailored for New York organizations:

items.title: ADA Physical Space Accessibility Audits
items.description: Assess entrances, restrooms, parking, signage, and interior routes for ADA compliance.

items.title: Website and App Accessibility Testing (WCAG 2.2)
items.description: Manual + automated audits for websites, mobile apps, portals, and kiosks.

items.title: Document Accessibility Remediation (PDF, Word, PPT)
items.description: Ensure all digital documents meet ADA, WCAG, and PDF/UA standards.

items.title: Accessibility Policy Writing & Risk Management
items.description: Create ADA policies, statements, and compliance frameworks to reduce legal risk.

items.title: VPAT Reports (For Government Contracts)
items.description: We prepare accurate VPAT 2.4 and ACR reports to support federal procurement processes.

items.title: Staff Accessibility Training & Workshops
items.description: Role-based ADA/WCAG training for technical and non-technical teams.

items.title: Ongoing Accessibility Monitoring & Consulting
items.description: Long-term consulting to help organizations maintain compliance as standards evolve.

sections.footer_description: We support organizations across New York, including New York City, Albany, Buffalo, Rochester, Long Island, and surrounding regions.

items.question: What services do your accessibility consultants in New York provide?
items.answer: We offer ADA & WCAG audits, remediation consulting, document accessibility, training, VPAT preparation, and physical accessibility assessments.

items.question: How can an accessibility consultant help my New York business meet ADA compliance?
items.answer: We identify barriers, provide remediation guidance, train staff, and help you meet Title II & III requirements and WCAG standards.

items.question: What is included in an ADA accessibility audit for New York businesses?
items.answer: Audits include issue identification, WCAG scoring, ADA gap analysis, remediation recommendations, and validation testing.

items.question: Do you offer both digital and physical accessibility assessments in New York?
items.answer: Yes — we provide web/app audits, document remediation, and built-environment assessments based on ADA Standards for Accessible Design.

items.question: Do New York websites need to comply with WCAG for ADA compliance?
items.answer: Yes. WCAG is the widely recognized standard used to measure ADA digital accessibility compliance.

items.question: How can I tell if my website needs accessibility remediation?
items.answer: If screen reader users encounter barriers, WCAG tests fail, or customers report usability issues, remediation is needed.

items.question: How long does an accessibility audit take for New York organizations?
items.answer: Most audits take 2–4 weeks, depending on website size, number of templates, and complexity.
